core_flip: Decouple the embed-unit from the return-unit: embed small for retrieval precision, return large for generation context.

operation_candidates.name: ChunkSizeSweep
operation_candidates.trigger: New long-doc corpus; chunk size unknown; before any multi-scale work
operation_candidates.action: Generate ~20 QA pairs; sweep chunk_size in {128,256,512,1024,2048} with overlap 10-20%; build one VectorStoreIndex per config; record faithfulness + relevancy + p95 latency
operation_candidates.output: A pinned single winner, OR a documented non-flat frontier that authorizes multi-scale chunking

operation_candidates.name: SentenceWindowSetup
operation_candidates.trigger: Flat prose; point-facts needing surrounding paragraph; lowest setup cost wanted
operation_candidates.action: SentenceWindowNodeParser(window_size=3) embeds single sentences with N-neighbor windows in metadata; at query time apply MetadataReplacementPostProcessor(target_metadata_key='window') so the LLM receives the window, not the lone sentence
operation_candidates.output: Sentence-level matching precision + paragraph-level synthesis context
operation_candidates.evidence: developers.llamaindex.ai SentenceWindow / MetadataReplacement docs ; llamaindex R3 Dilemma 5

operation_candidates.name: AutoMergingHierarchy
operation_candidates.trigger: Documents with clear hierarchy; bursty multi-chunk relevance
operation_candidates.action: HierarchicalNodeParser.from_defaults(chunk_sizes=[2048,512,128]) builds leaf->parent->root tree; index leaf nodes in a VectorStoreIndex, keep all nodes in a docstore; retrieve with AutoMergingRetriever which returns the parent once a configured fraction of its children are in the hit set
operation_candidates.output: Leaf-level precision escalating to section-level context when warranted

operation_candidates.name: WindowVsMergeChoice
operation_candidates.trigger: Multi-scale authorized (MSC-01 non-flat) but strategy undecided
operation_candidates.action: Inspect document structure: flat -> MSC-02; structured/bursty -> MSC-03; unknown -> start MSC-02 (cheaper) and escalate to MSC-03 if multi-chunk queries underperform
operation_candidates.output: A strategy chosen by document shape, not by elegance

operation_candidates.name: EmbedReturnDecouple
operation_candidates.trigger: Any time chunk-size tuning oscillates between precision and context
operation_candidates.action: Set embed-unit small, return-unit large; never let them be the same object once the sweep is non-flat; verify by inspecting what text the retriever actually sends to the synthesizer (must be the large unit)
operation_candidates.output: Pareto improvement on precision x context that no single chunk size achieves
operation_candidates.evidence: llamaindex Principle 2 (Node relationships) ; llamaindex R3 Dilemma 1 resolution

operation_candidates.name: MetadataBudgetGuard
operation_candidates.trigger: Small embed-units (<=256 tokens) with rich metadata propagated into payload
operation_candidates.action: Ensure metadata never occupies >50% of the embed-unit token budget; strip/shorten metadata before shrinking chunks
operation_candidates.output: Embed-units carry signal, not mostly boilerplate metadata

operation_candidates.name: MeasureOrRevert
operation_candidates.trigger: Multi-scale config wired but lift unverified
operation_candidates.action: Re-run the Gate-0 eval set; require a measurable faithfulness lift over the best single chunk size; if none, revert to the pinned single size
operation_candidates.output: Evidence that the added complexity earns its keep, or its removal
operation_candidates.evidence: llamaindex Stage 2 (eval loop gates every change)

dilemmas.title: Sentence-Window vs Auto-Merging
dilemmas.resolution: Match expansion geometry to document structure: flat prose -> horizontal (sentence-window); clear hierarchy or bursty multi-chunk -> vertical (auto-merging); unknown -> start sentence-window (lower setup cost)

dilemmas.title: Chunk-size sweep: the 1024 optimum and when it does not converge
dilemmas.resolution: Sweep first; Uber 10-K peaked at 1024 (prose default; code 80-160). If the frontier is non-flat, do not compromise on a middle size -> decouple via MSC-05

anti_patterns: A1: bump chunk_size (e.g. 4096) when answers feel incomplete -> decouple instead
A3: index parent nodes for auto-merging -> index leaves, store parents
A4: pick a compromise chunk size on a non-flat frontier
A5: multi-scale on a short/static corpus (<100k tokens)
A6: ship multi-scale config without re-running the eval set
A7: shrink embed-unit while metadata dominates the payload
boundaries: B1: short/static corpus (<100k tokens) -> prompt-stuff with caching
B2: chunk-size sweep already converged -> pin and stop
B3: bottleneck is embedding/reranker/synthesizer, not precision-vs-context
B4: hard real-time (<100ms) retrieval -> docstore lookups add latency
